\tzpentry{ID4164}{Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4164 introduces Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{v}_{E \times B} = \frac{\vec{E} \times \vec{B}}{B^2} \end{equation}
